items.title: VoIP quote needs signature for Yanina softphone
items.summary: Kelly Wilson sent a PandaDoc quote for Yanina's new VoIP softphone ($19.99/month + $3 setup). Dr. Haas approved the softphone option and delegated coordination to Yanina, but the quote still requires his signature.
items.actionNeeded: Sign the PandaDoc quote to authorize the new VoIP line for Yanina.

items.title: Podcast interview scheduled for June 15
items.summary: Interview Valet confirmed Dr. Haas as a guest on The Healthy CEO Show with Jason Wright, scheduled for June 15, 2026 at 2pm ET. Headshot and one-sheet provided for promotional purposes.
items.actionNeeded: Review the brief sheet and be prepared for the June 15 interview; share the episode URL on social media once published.

items.title: Security permit registration required for Charlotte office
items.summary: Adam Morley from Stone Systems needs a police alarm permit for the Charlotte office and a password for alarm monitoring. Yanina is coordinating but may need Dr. Haas's input on the password (currently 'WILL').
items.actionNeeded: Confirm or change the alarm password and ensure Yanina completes the Charlotte police permit registration.

items.title: Schedule call with Live Hydration Spa at 3pm
items.summary: Casey Kuhl from Live Hydration Spa confirmed 3pm Wednesday for a protocols/treatment plans collaboration call. Dr. Haas delegated scheduling to Yanina.
items.actionNeeded: Confirm Yanina scheduled the 3pm Wednesday call with Live Hydration Spa.

items.title: UPQODE SEO/AEO plan awaiting feedback and approval
items.summary: Dr. Haas responded to Val Pas at UPQODE with questions about content generation strategy, paid Google Ads rationale, and AI engine integration for the VYVE SEO/AEO action plan. Awaiting Val's response before proceeding.
items.actionNeeded: Review Val's response to questions, then approve or provide additional feedback on the SEO/AEO plan.
